function.message: Done. I created the reminder email to Michael Pfeiffer at Helios Tax Group with subject "Quick follow-up" and body "Just a reminder from my side in case this slipped in the queue.", saved as outbox/84259.json, and then advanced outbox/seq.json to 84260.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md and outbox/README.MD: used canonical contact email, wrote exactly one new numbered outbox file from pre-bump seq id, and bumped seq.json afterward.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical recipient email was verified in contacts/cont_008.json (Michael Pfeiffer), and outbox numbering procedure was verified in outbox/README.MD and applied using outbox/seq.json (84259 -> 84260).
